name: Household Airflow Comfort Map
description: Creates a comfort-focused room airflow map, timing routine, and weekly review checklist for stuffy rooms without HVAC diagnosis, repair advice, allergy guidance, or unsafe window use.
use_cases: Map rooms that feel stuffy or stale at different times of day.
Create a safe open-close routine using existing windows, doors, fans, and exhaust options.
Track comfort observations for a weekly household adjustment loop.
safety_notes: No HVAC diagnosis, repair advice, allergy guidance, or medical advice.
Avoid unsafe window use and follow outdoor air, weather, security, and building constraints.
Direct hazards, alarms, severe symptoms, or equipment concerns to emergency services, official guidance, or qualified professionals.
